list.name: dbname
list.label: Database
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT dbname FROM awr_enqueue_statistics ORDER BY dbname

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT instance FROM awr_enqueue_statistics WHERE dbname = '$dbname' ORDER BY instance

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query: SELECT begin_snap::text || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM awr_enqueue_statistics WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' ORDER BY begin_snap

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query: SELECT begin_snap::text || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM awr_enqueue_statistics WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' ORDER BY begin_snap

options.content: ⬅ Return to Navigation  |  🔄 Reset Filters

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_enq AS (  SELECT e.enqueue_type_request_reason  
FROM awr_enqueue_statistics e  
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''    
AND e.dbname = '$dbname'    AND e.instance = '$instance' 
AND e.begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int  
GROUP BY e.enqueue_type_request_reason  
ORDER BY SUM(e.waits) DESC   LIMIT 10) 
SELECT  e.snap_time AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata' AS time,  e.enqueue_type_request_reason,  e.waits 
FROM awr_enqueue_statistics e 
JOIN top_enq t ON t.enqueue_type_request_reason = e.enqueue_type_request_reason 
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''  
AND e.dbname = '$dbname'  AND e.instance = '$instance'  
AND e.begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Avg Wait Time (ms) by Enqueue Type (Top 10)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT enqueue_type_request_reason AS metric, AVG(av_wt_time_ms) AS avg_wait_time_ms
FROM awr_enqueue_statistics
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
GROUP BY enqueue_type_request_reason
ORDER BY avg_wait_time_ms DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT enqueue_type_request_reason, SUM(requests) AS requests, SUM(succ_gets) AS succ_gets,
       SUM(failed_gets) AS failed_gets, SUM(waits) AS waits, SUM(wt_time_s) AS total_wait_time_s
FROM awr_enqueue_statistics
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
GROUP BY enqueue_type_request_reason
ORDER BY requests DESC
LIMIT 10;
